'''Merno Blask''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Trevura]]. He was opposed to [[Droid/Legends|droids]], his open dislike for them resulting in an [[Trevura droid resistance|underground droid insurgency]] meant to put an end to his [[Governor/Legends|governorship]]. The [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[S-R6]] was hired to kill him.
